title: Exide Industries is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Exide Industries is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Quality Control Engineer looking for your next big career move? Exide Industries in Kolkata offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Exide Industries:
Exide Industries is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Exide Industries!
